recommendations.title: Catherine Called Birdy
recommendations.overview: A teenage girl in Medieval England navigates life and tries to avoid the arranged marriages her father maps out for her.

recommendations.title: Butterflies
recommendations.overview: Three strangers with one thing in common — the same father — come to a Turkish village to bury him, and learn about him and each other.

recommendations.title: The Virgin Suicides
recommendations.overview: A group of male friends become obsessed with five mysterious sisters who are sheltered by their strict, religious parents.

recommendations.title: The Stoning of Soraya M.
recommendations.overview: In 1986 Iran, Sahebjam, whose car breaks down in a remote village, enters into a conversation with Zahra, who relays to him the story about her niece, Soraya, whose arranged marriage to an abusive tyrant ended in tragedy.

recommendations.title: Barbie in the 12 Dancing Princesses
recommendations.overview: King Randolph sends for his cousin, Duchess Rowena, to help turn his daughters, Princess Genevieve and her eleven sisters, into royal material. But the Duchess strips the sisters of their fun, including their favorite pastime: dancing. When all hope

recommendations.title: Memoir of a Snail
recommendations.overview: Forcibly separated from her twin brother when they are orphaned, a melancholic misfit learns how to find confidence within herself amid the clutter of misfortunes and everyday life.

recommendations.title: Dinosaur
recommendations.overview: An orphaned dinosaur raised by lemurs joins an arduous trek to a sancturary after a meteorite shower destroys his family home.

recommendations.title: The Macaluso Sisters
recommendations.overview: Maria, Pinuccia, Lia, Katia and Antonella are five sisters who live in an apartment in Palermo. They make a living by renting doves for ceremonies. On a normal day at the beach, tragedy strucks.

recommendations.title: The Breath
recommendations.overview: A small task force of the Turkish army have to defend a relay station in the middle of nowhere against a possible terrorist raid.

recommendations.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
recommendations.overview: As two evil sisters prepare to conquer the land, two renegades—Eric the Huntsman, who aided Snow White in defeating Ravenna in Snowwhite and the Huntsman, and his forbidden lover, Sara—set out to stop them.
